title: salix × zedlitziana
intro: Salix × zedlitziana, also known as the Zedlitz willow, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Salicaceae family, derived from the crossing of Salix alba and Salix fragilis. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Salix × zedlitziana include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
